title: Cambajuva ulei
taxonomy: Cambajuva ulei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Cambajuva, which is part of the larger plant family Annonaceae. Annonaceae is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. This family comprises over 200 genera and more than 2,000 species. Cambajuva ulei is native to South America and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
